title: Verify existing implementation of cache wrapper
description: The cache wrapper implementation already exists in src/services/cache-wrapper.ts using the Cache utility from src/utils/cache.ts, with comprehensive tests in src/services/cache-wrapper.test.ts covering cache hits, misses, TTL expiry, key isolation, and different TTL values per call.
existing_patterns: src/utils/cache.ts — Cache class with TTL expiry using in-memory Map with LRU eviction and expiresAt tracking
src/services/*.ts — Service layer modules with typed dependency interfaces
src/utils/*.test.ts — Co-located test files using vitest with fake timers for TTL testing
